creator: dfr@rabson.org
text:
I am a little confused. I fixed this exact bug while updating the port to 1.36.0 - the patch for it is in freebsd/ports and was committed as part of revision hash 284ce500bc1907629955c7d8d631f3cad0e24afe. The fix was also committed upstream in github.com/containers/buildah as hash 1480f147fa88c1043d63689a6d775d28a65272ca.

I built and installed buildah-1.36.0_3 locally and tried your reproduction steps without getting the error. Is it possible that your buildah was not built with this fix somehow?

I am planning to update the podman ports soon which will update buildah to 1.37.1 and I will re-test as part of that update.
